notes_for_main_thread: Chunk 02 has seven findings: (1) major splice boundary at 576.75s loses ~35 words from previous clip (Metapod segment); (2-3) two more splices in Kakuna/Metapod sequence cause truncation/hallucination suppression in default transcript; (4) one homophone ('no' vs 'know') in rival strategy narration; (5-7) Pokemon name variants across Bayleaf/Staryu/Starmie/Ghastly/Starby sequence, with normalizer corrections available. All issues are transcript-only fixes or investigation of splice handling—no audio cuts needed. Splice points cluster in v6 576-580s region (three consecutive in 3.4s window). Cross-chunk pattern: chunk 02 exit segment (seq 57 at 841.8s) is truncated and continues into chunk 03 opening. Recommend re-segment transcripts relative to actual clip boundaries rather than 15s overlap windows.
